outputs.main.sas:
# Load required libraries
library(admiral)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(tidyr)
library(haven)
library(xportr)

# Read SDTM source datasets
adsl <- read_xpt("adsl.xpt")
ae <- read_xpt("ae.xpt")
ex <- read_xpt("ex.xpt")
suppae <- read_xpt("suppae.xpt")

# Merge supplemental qualifiers with AE
ae <- ae %>%
  left_join(suppae, by = c("STUDYID", "USUBJID", "DOMAIN", "AESEQ" = "IDVARVAL")) %>%
  mutate(
    QNAM = if_else(is.na(QNAM), NA_character_, QNAM),
    QVAL = if_else(is.na(QVAL), NA_character_, QVAL)
  )

# Derive custom query (CQ01NAM) - example: events of special interest
# Assuming QNAM = "CQ01" in SUPPAE
cq01_data <- ae %>%
  filter(QNAM == "CQ01") %>%
  select(STUDYID, USUBJID, AESEQ, CQ01NAM = QVAL)

ae <- ae %>%
  left_join(cq01_data, by = c("STUDYID", "USUBJID", "AESEQ"))

# Create ADAE by merging with ADSL
adae <- ae %>%
  inner_join(adsl, by = c("STUDYID", "USUBJID")) %>%
  mutate(
    # Derive ASTDY (Analysis Start Relative Day)
    ASTDY = case_when(
      !is.na(AESTDTC) ~ as.numeric(difftime(ymd(AESTDTC), TRTSDT, units = "days")) + 1,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    # Derive AENDY (Analysis End Relative Day)
    AENDY = case_when(
      !is.na(AEENDTC) ~ as.numeric(difftime(ymd(AEENDTC), TRTSDT, units = "days")) + 1,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    # Derive ASEV (Analysis Severity)
    ASEV = case_when(
      AESEV == "MILD" ~ 1,
      AESEV == "MODERATE" ~ 2,
      AESEV == "SEVERE" ~ 3,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    # Derive AREL (Analysis Relationship)
    AREL = case_when(
      AEREL %in% c("POSSIBLE", "PROBABLE", "DEFINITE") ~ "RELATED",
      AEREL == "NOT RELATED" ~ "NOT RELATED",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    # Derive TRTEMFL (Treatment Emergent Flag)
    TRTEMFL = case_when(
      !is.na(ASTDY) & ASTDY >= 1 & (is.na(AENDY) | AENDY <= 99999) ~ "Y",
      TRUE ~ "N"
    ),
    # Additional flags for treatment-emergent refinement
    # Consider events starting on or after first treatment date
    TRTEMFL = case_when(
      TRTEMFL == "Y" & !is.na(ASTDY) & ASTDY >= 1 ~ "Y",
      TRUE ~ "N"
    )
  )

# Apply ADaM variable attributes and metadata
var_spec <- tibble::tribble(
  ~variable, ~label, ~type,
  "STUDYID", "Study Identifier", "character",
  "USUBJID", "Unique Subject Identifier", "character",
  "AESEQ", "Sequence Number", "numeric",
  "ASTDY", "Analysis Start Relative Day", "numeric",
  "AENDY", "Analysis End Relative Day", "numeric",
  "ASEV", "Analysis Severity", "numeric",
  "AREL", "Analysis Relationship", "character",
  "TRTEMFL", "Treatment Emergent Flag", "character",
  "CQ01NAM", "Custom Query 01 Name", "character",
  "TRTSDT", "Date of First Exposure to Treatment", "Date",
  "TRTEDT", "Date of Last Exposure to Treatment", "Date"
)

# Apply labels and attributes
adae <- adae %>%
  select(all_of(var_spec$variable)) %>%
  xportr_label(var_spec) %>%
  xportr_type(var_spec)

# Output xpt dataset
xportr_write(adae, "adae.xpt", label = "Adverse Events Analysis Dataset")

# Print summary
cat("ADAE dataset created with", nrow(adae), "records\n")
